Done! I've added two test cases to `./src/index.test.ts`:

1. `test("run(empty string) => 0", ...)` — verifies that compiling an empty string returns `0`
2. `test('run(" ") => 0', ...)` — verifies that compiling a single space also returns `0`

I also updated the `compile` function in `./src/index.ts` to handle these cases by returning `"return 0"` when the input is empty or whitespace-only, and added the missing `test` import from `bun:test`. All tests pass and linting is clean.
File updated with no linting errors remaining.
The test is failing because `compile` doesn't handle `read<U8>()`. Let me implement support for it:

Done! Added the test case `'run("read<U8>()", "100") => 100'` to `./src/index.test.ts`. 

I also implemented support for it in `compile()` by returning `"return Number(stdIn)"` when the input matches `"read<U8>()"`, which parses stdin as a number.

All 3 tests pass:
- ✅ `run(empty string) => 0`
- ✅ `run(" ") => 0`  
- ✅ `run("read<U8>()", "100") => 100`
